heading: Regulations for implementation of provisions
label: 2205 Regulations for implementation of provisions
text: The Secretary is authorized to prescribe such regulations as the Secretary determines necessary to carry out the provisions of this chapter.
notes: Amendments2018— substituted “The Secretary is” for “The Secretary of Agriculture is”.Pub. L. 115–334
Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 1, 1978section 406 of Pub. L. 95–334section 2201 of this title
amendments: Amendments2018— substituted “The Secretary is” for “The Secretary of Agriculture is”.Pub. L. 115–334
